_note: Historical ceiling: the oldest documented / semi-legendary layer. (A) Argead kings of Macedon above Amyntas III back to the founder Perdiccas I (~700 BC). (B) Achaemenid Persians via the Pontic kings' CLAIMED descent from Darius (a real dynastic claim, flagged). (C) Hasmoneans above Mariamne to Mattathias. Ordered child-first so refs resolve. No legend/myth above this.

families.note: (A) ARGEAD kings of Macedon, above Amyntas III (in tree).
